text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation in this environment. The first space, with its clean glass walls and empty meeting room, evokes the quiet before collaboration—the blank canvas of thought. The next space, vibrant and colorful, is alive with ideas, as the words on the wall invite me into a world of research and innovation. It makes me reflect on the interplay between isolation for deep work and the communal aspect of sharing and evolving ideas. There is both calmness and excitement, a blend of order and creative potential.
